auth.passwordMinLength: Nenosiri lazima liwe na angalau herufi 6
auth.passwordMinLength12: Nenosiri lazima liwe na angalau herufi 12
auth.passwordRequireLowercase: Nenosiri lazima liwe na angalau herufi ndogo moja
auth.passwordRequireUppercase: Nenosiri lazima liwe na angalau herufi kubwa moja
auth.passwordRequireDigit: Nenosiri lazima liwe na angalau nambari moja
auth.passwordRequireSpecial: Nenosiri lazima liwe na angalau herufi maalum moja
auth.twoFactorInvalid: Nambari ya vipengele viwili si halali
auth.errors.invalidCredentials: Barua pepe au nenosiri si sahihi
auth.errors.accountLocked: Akaunti imefungwa kwa muda kwa sababu ya majaribio mengi ya kuingia yaliyoshindwa
auth.errors.invalidToken: Tokeni si halali au imeisha muda
auth.errors.twoFactorRequired: Nambari ya uthibitishaji wa vipengele viwili inahitajika
auth.errors.invalid2FACode: Nambari ya uthibitishaji wa vipengele viwili si halali
auth.errors.passwordResetNotAvailableFor: Kuweka upya nenosiri hakupatikani kwa akaunti za OAuth
auth.errors.failedToGenerateResetToken: Imeshindwa kutengeneza tokeni ya kuweka upya nenosiri
auth.errors.invalidResetToken: Tokeni ya kuweka upya si halali au imeisha muda
auth.errors.resetTokenExpired: Tokeni ya kuweka upya nenosiri imeisha muda
auth.errors.twoFactorAlreadyEnabled: Uthibitishaji wa vipengele viwili umewashwa tayari
auth.landing.title: Karibu TallyJ
auth.landing.description: TallyJ is a modern election management system specifically designed for Bahá’í communities. It provides a comprehensive platform for managing elections, people, ballots, and real-time results tallying.
auth.landing.optionOfficerDesc: Simamia uchaguzi, watu, na uchakataji wa kura. Kwa wahesabu wakuu na wasimamizi wa uchaguzi.
auth.landing.optionVoterDesc: Piga kura yako ukitumia barua pepe au nambari ya simu yako.
auth.landing.optionTellerDesc: Chakata kura na usaidie katika uchaguzi.
auth.landing.optionExternalDesc: Fikia mfumo maalum wa uchaguzi wa maafisa.
auth.voterLogin.title: Mpiga kura
auth.voterLogin.emailSent: Nambari ya uthibitishaji imetumwa kwa barua pepe yako
auth.tellerLogin.title: Msaidizi Mhesabu
auth.tellerLogin.passcodePlaceholder: Weka nambari ya siri ya uchaguzi
auth.tellerJoin.title: Jiunge na Uchaguzi kama Mhesabu
auth.tellerJoin.description: Chagua uchaguzi na weka nambari ya ufikiaji kujiunge kama msaidizi mhesabu
auth.tellerJoin.noElections: Hakuna uchaguzi uliowazi kwa wahesabu kwa sasa
auth.tellerJoin.invalidElection: Uchaguzi au nambari ya ufikiaji si sahihi
auth.googleCallback.title: Kukamilisha Kuingia
auth.voterAuth.title: Uthibitishaji wa Mpiga Kura
auth.voterBallot.title: Piga Kura Yako
auth.voterConfirmation.title: Kura Imethibitishwa
auth.landing.benefits.title: Modern Election Management for Bahá’í Communities
auth.landing.benefits.subtitle: Jukwaa kamili lililoundwa kurahisisha mchakato wa uchaguzi wako.
auth.landing.features.realtime.title: Ushirikiano wa Wakati Halisi
auth.landing.features.realtime.descripti: Wahesabu wengi wanaweza kufanya kazi wakati mmoja na masasisho ya moja kwa moja.
auth.landing.features.secure.title: Salama na ya Kuaminika
auth.landing.features.secure.description: Imejengwa na usalama wa kiwango cha biashara. Data yako ya uchaguzi imesimbwa.
auth.landing.features.flexible.title: Chaguzi za Upigaji Kura Zinazobadilika
auth.landing.features.flexible.descripti: Msaada kwa kura za ana kwa ana, kupiga kura mtandaoni, na uchaguzi wa wawakilishi.
auth.landing.features.transparent.title: Uhesabu wa Uwazi
auth.landing.features.transparent.descri: Njia kamili ya ukaguzi na kumbukumbu za kina.
auth.landing.features.multilingual.title: Msaada wa Lugha Nyingi
auth.landing.features.multilingual.descr: Interface available in multiple languages to serve diverse Bahá’í communities worldwide.
auth.landing.features.accessible.title: Rahisi Kutumia
auth.landing.features.accessible.descrip: Kiolesura cha angavu kilichoundwa kwa viwango vyote vya ujuzi wa kiufundi.
auth.landing.cta.title: Uko Tayari Kuanza?
auth.landing.cta.description: Chagua jukumu lako hapo juu kupata ufikiaji wa mfumo na kuanza kusimamia uchaguzi wako leo.
